name: E-12 cache: cache_hits > 0 when tree_sha unchanged between runs
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/runner.sh" --filter "cl414-Q-1-space-config-yaml-ships" >/dev/null 2>&1; out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/runner.sh" --stats --filter "cl414-Q-1-space-config-yaml-ships" 2>&1); echo "$out" | grep -qE "cache_hits=[1-9]" && echo hot_cache 1>&2
